window.label: Entire history
window.phrase: the entire available history up to 2026-07-22

evidence.claim: On August 12, 2024, G42 signed an MoU with Uganda's Ministry of ICT to build cloud data infrastructure and develop AI tools.
evidence.snippet: The partnership aims to develop local digital public infrastructure and create localized AI models to optimize government administration.

evidence.claim: On September 18, 2024, Uganda Airlines and Etihad Airways entered a comprehensive codeshare agreement to expand air travel connections.
evidence.snippet: The agreement allows passenger bookings on integrated flight routes, enhancing connectivity between Entebbe and the Middle East via Abu Dhabi.

evidence.claim: On October 24, 2024, UAE's Masdar signed an agreement to develop a 150MW solar photovoltaic project in western Uganda.
evidence.snippet: The multi-million dollar renewable energy project will boost Uganda's national grid capacity and support rural electrification efforts.

evidence.claim: On November 15, 2024, ADFD disbursed $45 million to co-finance construction works for the Kampala-Jinja Expressway in Uganda.
evidence.snippet: This funding represents a key step in upgrading Uganda's national transport corridor, aimed at reducing regional logistics costs.

evidence.claim: On July 14, 2024, UAE's Al Dahra announced a $20 million investment in commercial rice farming and processing in eastern Uganda.
evidence.snippet: The agribusiness project focuses on high-yield cultivation, modern processing mills, and training programs for local smallholder farmers.

evidence.claim: On October 8, 2024, Uganda and the UAE successfully concluded another round of bilateral Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA) negotiations.
evidence.snippet: Delegates finalized key tariff lines on agricultural goods and minerals, paving the way for a historic bilateral trade agreement.

evidence.claim: On December 10, 2024, DP World commissioned a $15 million expansion of its inland dry port and logistics hub in Kampala.
evidence.snippet: The expansion adds modern cold chain storage facilities, increasing Kampala's capacity to handle perishable export goods like horticultural products.

evidence.claim: On January 11, 2025, Abu Dhabi's ADQ initiated talks with Uganda's government to establish a $200 million joint investment fund.
evidence.snippet: The sovereign fund will target strategic investments in East African agriculture, mineral processing, and digital infrastructure.

evidence.claim: On February 22, 2025, Masdar announced plans to develop a 100MW wind energy project in Uganda's Karamoja region.
evidence.snippet: Building on its solar achievements, Masdar is expanding into wind energy to diversify Uganda's renewable electricity supply portfolio.

evidence.claim: On September 26, 2024, EDGE Group signed a defense supply and tactical training contract with the Ugandan People's Defence Forces.
evidence.snippet: The contract focuses on supplying state-of-the-art tactical equipment, unmanned aerial systems, and advanced military training modules.

edges.claim: On August 12, 2024, G42 signed an MoU with Uganda's Ministry of ICT to build cloud data infrastructure and develop AI tools.
On September 18, 2024, Uganda Airlines and Etihad Airways entered a comprehensive codeshare agreement to expand air travel connections.
On October 24, 2024, UAE's Masdar signed an agreement to develop a 150MW solar photovoltaic project in western Uganda.
On December 10, 2024, DP World commissioned a $15 million expansion of its inland dry port and logistics hub in Kampala.
On July 14, 2024, UAE's Al Dahra announced a $20 million investment in commercial rice farming and processing in eastern Uganda.
On October 8, 2024, Uganda and the UAE successfully concluded another round of bilateral Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA) negotiations.
On September 26, 2024, EDGE Group signed a defense supply and tactical training contract with the Ugandan People's Defence Forces.
